Si reclamas algún detalle te lo atienden muy amables Felicitaciones patente EUC990

reviews.comment:
Jueves 13:00 hs. Al playero se le dio por no atenderme. 10 min quieto en el surtidor y pasaba por al lado y no me atendió. Me tuve que ir ,un maleducado.

(Translated by Google)
Thursday, 1:00 PM. The gas station attendant decided to ignore me. I stood at the pump for 10 minutes, walked right past him, and he didn't even bother to help me. I had to leave; he was rude.
